name: Integrated Math 2
description: Extend algebraic and geometric reasoning through functions, proof, probability, and modeling.
descriptionEs: Amplía el razonamiento algebraico y geométrico mediante funciones, demostración, probabilidad y modelación.

days.title: Course welcome
days.summary: Review class routines and what makes a mathematical argument convincing.

days.title: Claims and evidence
days.summary: Evaluate examples, counterexamples, and incomplete reasoning.

days.title: Building an argument
days.summary: Organize observations into a clear chain of reasoning.

days.title: Representations as evidence
days.summary: Use diagrams, tables, and algebra to support a conclusion.

days.title: Reasoning check
days.summary: Revise an argument for clarity and precision.
